reason: Global TianChen-RV architecture, RVV-first authority chain, stage order, and source-of-truth constraints.
RVV plugin ownership of typed body legality, route planning, realization, and fail-closed diagnostics.
Common EmitC route boundary and generated bundle responsibilities.
Focused compiler/runtime evidence requirements and test selection policy.
Evidence interpretation and runtime correctness claim discipline.

summary: Repaired generated composed product-reduction-dequant route execution semantics by carrying the i32 reduction scalar through a provider-owned local across runtime VL chunks and moving f32 dequant/store to post-loop; product-only reduction carry now seeds from out[0] rather than re-reading acc[0] each chunk.

Extended the generated-bundle ABI evidence script with neutral consumer support for widening_product_reduce_dequantize_f32, including selected-body/bundle/emitted-C++ validation, external C ABI harness generation, signed i8 reference patterns, two nonzero runtime scales, source/accumulator preservation, output tail sentinel preservation, and f32 tolerance.
